This repository uses the plugin name "WP Shadow" and the existing slug/branding as an intentional product decision.

When assisting in this workspace:
- Do not suggest renaming the plugin, changing the slug, or rebranding it as part of compliance, review, or submission guidance.
- Focus compliance and submission work on code, packaging, behavior, copy accuracy, and WordPress.org policy alignment without proposing name changes.
- Treat existing plugin naming as fixed unless the user explicitly asks to revisit branding.
